name: freelancer managing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For freelancer managing 5–15 projects/month, inaccurate hour tracking causes delayed payments. We automate timesheet submission instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Tracking hours accurately for multiple clients
